---
title: "config_composite.yaml"
toc: false
page-layout: full
number-sections: false
---

[← Back to workflow](../../ascat.html)

Runtime configuration for ASCAT-C multi-day and monthly composites.

::: {.code-shell}

```{.yaml}
{{< include ../../workflows/ascat/config/config_composite.yaml >}}
```

:::
